agents.name: TimeSeriesQueryAgent
agents.description: Retrieves time-series numerical data from internal data stores over a time range and interval; supports hourly/daily windows, filtering by metric name, and returning arrays ready for analysis or plotting. Example: 'get wind speed for last 24 hours'.

agents.name: SQLQueryAgent
agents.description: Executes structured SQL-like queries over tabular data: filters, joins, aggregations, grouping, ID lookups, and simple transformations on rows/columns. Example: 'select rows where customer_id = 1023'.

agents.name: APIDataFetchAgent
agents.description: Fetches live or recent data from REST APIs using endpoints and query parameters; handles auth, pagination, JSON payloads, and external services. Example: 'call /metrics/v1 to fetch telemetry JSON'.

agents.name: LogRetrievalAgent
agents.description: Retrieves and filters system/application logs by keywords, severity, timestamps, patterns, and service names; returns relevant log slices for debugging. Example: 'show ERROR logs for API Gateway'.

agents.name: MetadataLookupAgent
agents.description: Finds schema info, column descriptions, dataset metadata, and what data exists; answers 'what fields are available' and data catalog questions. Example: 'list columns in transactions table'.

agents.name: StatisticalAnalysisAgent
agents.description: Computes statistics on numeric data: mean, variance, correlations, distributions, summary metrics, and quick sanity checks for ranges or outliers. Example: 'compute mean and std dev for temperature'.

agents.name: TrendAnalysisAgent
agents.description: Detects trends and long-term patterns in time series; can identify seasonality, slope changes, and high-level direction over a period. Example: 'identify trend over past 7 days'.

agents.name: AnomalyDetectionAgent
agents.description: Detects spikes, drops, outliers, and unusual patterns in numeric/time-series signals; highlights events worth investigating. Example: 'find anomalies in power output'.

agents.name: ForecastAgent
agents.description: Predicts future values from historical time-series using forecasting logic; supports horizons, projections, and confidence-style summaries. Example: 'forecast next 72 hours of wind speed'.

agents.name: PlotGenerationAgent
agents.description: Creates plots/charts (line, bar, scatter, histogram) to visualize numeric or time-series data; chooses appropriate chart type for the request. Example: 'plot temperature over last week'.

agents.name: SummaryAgent
agents.description: Summarizes data and insights in concise natural language; focuses on key points, changes, conclusions, and next-step takeaways. Example: 'summarize what happened today'.

agents.name: ReportWriterAgent
agents.description: Writes structured detailed reports with sections, narrative, and formatted explanations of analysis; suitable for stakeholders or documentation. Example: 'write a detailed report about last week'.
